name: Abhishek Madewar
title: Flutter Developer & AI/ML Engineer
bio: B.Tech CSE graduate building AI-integrated applications across mobile, web, and backend. I turn ideas into deployable products — pairing Flutter and React front ends with FastAPI/Django backends and AI vision APIs like Gemini and Groq. Currently exploring my next full-time role while shipping side projects and competing in challenges like Google Solution Challenge.
shortBio: I build AI-powered apps that ship — Flutter, React, FastAPI, and a habit of finishing what I start.
